name: Abacus Life Inc. 9.875% Fixed Rate Senior Notes due 2028
summary: Abacus Life Inc. 9.875% Fixed Rate Senior Notes due 2028 represents a debt security issued by Abacus Life Inc.. These notes carry a fixed interest rate of 9.875% and will mature in 2028. Investors who purchase these notes are lending money to Abacus Life, and are entitled to regular interest payments and the return of the principal at maturity.
